subtitle: Return to work week
context: James Salas Guillen is out on annual leave until 18 June, and Marie Cooksey is out until 13 June. Michael O'Sullivan returns today. Several urgent items need attention including GitHub workflow failures, IM Principles URL changes, and handover documents from James.

urgent.title: GitHub Dashboard Workflow Failures
urgent.sub: Multiple failed pipeline runs for hris-dashboard since 4 June require investigation and fix
urgent.subject: [begb0037admin/hris-dashboard] Run failed: Update HRIS Dashboard - main

urgent.title: IM Principles URL Change - Go Live 23-24 June
urgent.sub: New URL confirmed with Laura Porter. Old page comes down 23/24 June - update links in PXD and systems now
urgent.subject: RE: IM Principles - change to URL

urgent.title: James Salas Guillen Handover
urgent.sub: H&S and other outstanding items documented. Review handover priorities and delegate coverage for his absence until 18 June
urgent.subject: H&S Handover
